steps.title: Use the city's praise
steps.content: The city residents point to the Turkins as the most accomplished and enlightened family of all. That wording singles them out from the city's other pleasant families and gives them special standing.

steps.title: Reject unsupported traits
steps.content: A says they are newcomers, but newcomers are the people complaining about the city. C invents dislike of the city. D says they are amused by others, which the text never suggests. The answer is B.
